channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. has a quarter fewer immigration judges than it did a year ago. Here's why
item.description: The continued drain of personnel from the already strained immigration court system has contributed to depleted staff morale, mounting case backlogs —...

item.title: What NPR reporters will remember most about these Winter Olympics
item.description: NPR's reporters on the ground in Italy reflect on a far-flung, jam-packed Winter Olympics.

item.title: Trump to raise global tariffs. And, most say the state of the union is weak, poll says
item.description: President Trump says he is raising global tariffs to 15%. And ahead of the president's address tomorrow, most Americans say the state of the union is ...

item.title: Influencers are promoting peptides for better health. What does the science say?

item.title: Changing His Family’s Future with 3 “Boring” Rentals and $2,500/Month Cash Flow

item.title: Defense Secretary summons Anthropic’s Amodei over military use of Claude

item.title: EU diplomats scramble to overcome Hungary’s threat to derail new sanctions on Russia
item.description: Hungary is blocking the EU’s latest sanctions plan against Russia, and it is also holding up new aid for Ukraine four years after Russia invaded.

item.title: Prosecutors stand by former militant’s conviction but blast judge’s prior conduct as prosecutor
